name: Terraria RPG 1.2
description:
An open-world Terraria experience! If you know what Terraria is, you know what this ensues. So far only has an opening for Melee, but I will add more. :D

1.1: Added Ranger! Have as much fun as you want with this vulgar, fungus-dwelling fella.

1.2: Mage.

Someone PLEASE bully me into finishing this
creator: TheOneAndOnly_DarkEsau
